items.name: Diamond Pentacrown
items.description:
Carved over millennia from a single chunk of carbon, the white gemstone sparkles and mirrors its surroundings. Created by VOEW; came out of the True Reflection Gift Box

This hat uses PBR materials and dynamically changes based on the lighting of the experience your in! will appear a plain white in thumbnail as well as in games with non dynamic lighting.

items.description: A hummingbird flaps its wings up to 70 times per second, and their heart rate can reach 1,260 beats per minute, and THAT'S before their morning coffee.
